name: oswald-while-you-wait
description: Plays Oswald episodes from a YouTube playlist while your AI assistant is working, and pauses (resuming where it left off) when it stops.

oswald.port.description: Port for the local control server (must match the Claude Code plugin's OSWALD_PORT).

oswald.playlistId.description: YouTube playlist ID to play (the part after list= in the URL).

oswald.autostartServer.description: Start the control server automatically when VSCode launches.

oswald.autoShowPanel.description: Automatically open the player panel on startup.
